title: MikroTik 24V Power Adapter (24V/0,8A) for RouterBOARD, ALIX - 18POW
description: Original MikroTik power adapter with direct installation in a socket with a standard 5.5 / 2.1mm connector designed for powering, for example MikroTik devices with input voltage 24V DC . The power adapter has a maximum power 19W and a maximum output current 0,8A GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
